summary: Reposted Telemundo Chicago news segment with an English headline overlay reading 'Young man from Chicago with terminal cancer asks to see his parents detained by ICE.' The video shows two young men seated together indoors, one wearing a pink soccer jersey and resting under a patterned blanket. A Spanish lower-third reads 'KEVIN PIDE VER A SUS PADRES DETENIDOS POR ICE' with an 'EXCLUSIVA' tag and a 'TelemundoChicago' bug and clock. The audio is Spanish-language reporting about a young man with terminal cancer whose parents are in ICE detention.

script.scene: Two young men seated together indoors, one in a pink jersey under a blanket; English headline overlay and Spanish chyron 'KEVIN PIDE VER A SUS PADRES DETENIDOS POR ICE.'
